review_title: Great app for building custom forms
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how user friendly this software is.
cons: I wish the cost was a little lower, but it is not unreasonably expensive.

review_title: Customize your pdf here
description: It have data accurately revised. Forms customization is reliable and have good ability.
author: Nomfundo M.
pros: It have customizable pdfs which are cool.
cons: Does not allow many pictures to be taken.

review_title: Kizeo Review
description: It was neither a negative nor positive - it did its job
author: Mackenzie M.
pros: That you could auto-populate parts of the form The customer support
cons: No worker profiles Form creation not user friendly

review_title: Excellent- far more versatile than I first thought
description: Implement system in one tenth of the time - and massively flexible
author: Bruce G.
pros: Hierarchy and reference lists. Hugely flexible and powerful. and no code needed. You must understand this functionality otherwise you have no idea of what to expect from a form. I have test driven over 10 forms software systems. This functionality is a game changer. Header and line tables - excellent - plus calculations - very good Kizeo has by far the most flexible sliders- configure range, text and numeric Conditional display of fields through many options Custom user based fields - which prepopulate forms - helps with automation. Transfer froms between users- Initiate partially populated forms then send to user- big step in automation. Output to word, excel pdf- using word and excel for the template - cant get better. Other systems have clunky template systems Automation for emailing - very flexible, very powerful Connect to database - Postgres, SQL server - minimal code - Very good REST API - didnt need to go there because Connector does all I need. When we first started, we didnt know if our project was going to be constrained by Kizeo in regard to functionality. We were prepared to use the KIZEO design as a spec for getting the whole thing done in custom code. Kizeo delivered
cons: Would like to have a form where the pulldown calls up data from another form. Would like further calculation functionality regarding dates. ie 9-May-18 + 1 =10-May-19 Web interface for design of forms is slow- we are in Perth Australia. Would be good to have video tutorials

review_title: Simple, easy to use, works great in the field off the grid. A real time saver back in the office.
description: Strongest points are time saved in the office, increased efficiency and accuracy in the field collecting data. Customized reports that are already formatted for entry into our database. No more transposing hand written field data into spreadsheets.
author: Jeff M.
pros: I like that I don't have to know how to code. Another big plus is that setting up basic data collection forms is quick and easy. I can set up simple forms for my survey crew that are easy to use. This helps them enter data accurately, and I really like that I can set up customized output reports, customize what data are included, and what type of report email is automatically sent, and to whom. Works very well on mobile devices. I love that Kizeo has helped my team eliminate the need to manually transpose handwritten field data into a spreadsheet back in the office. Time saver!
cons: I wish that the table functions were a bit easier to use. It would be great if the column widths could vary. Currently, it is difficult to switch back and forth between entering data, viewing the entered data, and editing existing data. I can't really use it in dynamic scenarios (such as keeping track of harvest quotas during a 4 hour harvest) where values and amounts for up to 40 individuals need to be updated quickly and summed in tabular form. Also wish more advanced calculations and functions were supported. A random number (eg. RAND(0-100) ) function would be great for setting up sampling transects for a biological survey, for example.

review_title: Kizeo Forms for Safety and Maintenance
description: We have used Kizeo as our primary tool for safety forms, daily Job Safety Analysis and equipment inspections are documented using kizeo forms. They email out to maintenance and other key personnel so that they are in the loop. We are exploring more uses and finding that we have been able to replace some paid services with our own forms using kizeo. It is a great product.
author: Ben H.
pros: I have been very impressed by the ease of use and the ability to customize forms for our business use.
cons: Some of the customization requires a sound knowledge of coding. More tutorials would be helpful especially to help automate the exportation of data.

review_title: Kizeo helps us to be more reactive and provide information to clients quicker
description: Facility optimization has been improving because of using Kizeo. Improving data accuracy and accoutability help us to jump a step further in the process optimization and reliability.
author: Marien Z.
pros: The Kizeo application is userfriendly and can be use no matter internet connection works. No specific training is required for a new user, only the motivation to quite pen and paper!
cons: Like every software, some improvement could be done. Having admisnitrator is great however when you are an adminitrator you get an access to everything. I wish we could get two level of adminitrator. THe master one who is managing everything like the current one. Others ones which are main users lead for a plant of a department. THis person will be authorized to do everything only on his department scope, not more.

review_title: Kizeo forms has been a fantastic addition to our system.
author: Keith W.
pros: My favorite things about the app are the ease of use on the front end for the user is fantastic, even our old, less tech friendly guys have been able to use it. I'm also a big fan of its customizable pdf exports. Appearance is a big factor for our company and being able to export information in a nice, well organized, clean manner is important to us. I also really like its tutorial sections. They're incredibly indepth and well written.
cons: My least favorite thing about Kizeo is its lack of any sort of undo while making forms, one screw up and you could lose a lot of your work. Another, and this is the biggest thing holding us back from company wide adoption is the cost. It's very expensive and that limits adoption on our part.

review_title: ABC
description: The Rapidity that's give the software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Performance of the software is incredible
cons: The Simplicity of the software is incredible

review_title: Customer Support
description: The integration with Excel is a game changer for our business but the customer support means we will not be implementing as we cannot integrate with Sharepoint.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very easy to use and has a simple interface, it can integrate with Word and Excel.
cons: Customer support is zero, I emailed them 4 times with no response. Is says online that it integrates with Sharepoint but I can't get this working.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nuestros Procesos están evolucionando con Kizeo Forms
description: Kizeo Forms llegó para establecer una estándar en los registros de nuestras transaciones internar y en una captura de datos confiable para el seguimiento de los procesos en base a métricas.
author: Nicolas C.
pros: Kizeo Forms es una plataforma increíble para gestionar datos. Lo que más me encanta es cómo puedo generar flujos de trabajo y su amplia integración con otras plataformas. Simplifica todo y mejora la eficiencia. ¡Altamente recomendado!
cons: Baja personalización estética de los formularios, esto podría ayudar a gente que es mas visual.Gestionar modificaciones en los flujos de trabajo se vuelve engorroso, ya que no se tiene una visión global del flujo en un sola pantalla.

review_title: Kizeo Forms
description: Utilizando este sistema, automatizamos y optimizamos los procesos de soporte y revisión en campo Ahorramos tiempo y dinero en tener los reportes, ahora son en línea y en tiempo real
author: David C.
pros: Es un sistema en la nube, en español que se pudo adaptar a nuestras necesidades en específico Trabaja de forma online y offline Puede ser personalizable Su soporte técnico es muy bueno, atento y profesional
cons: Por el momento todo bien El soporte que nos han brindado para hacer los formularios ha resuelto nuestras dudas
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: La personnalisation totale et le support technique dédié
description: Grâce à Kizeo, nos rapports sont complets et professionnels, les techniciens n'oublient pas d'étapes comme prendre des photos, les commentaires sont enrichis car ils ont juste à choisir des réponses pré-faites.Gain de temps après les chantiers, car le rapport se fait pendant les opérations.Gain de temps dans la transmission des éléments inter-service.Satisfaction de nos clients, car les rapports sont pro et transmis plus rapidement
author: Delphine R.
pros: Ce que j'ai apprécié le plus dès le début, c'est la manière dont vous accompagnez les clients dans la découverte de l'application en phase d'essai et la disponibilité des équipes à l'utilisation de l'application.Le fait de pouvoir personnaliser et adapter parfaitement les formulaires à notre métier nous donne une grande liberté.Le support technique est de haut niveau, très disponible et bienveillant afin que l'on soit toujours satisfait à l'issue d'une problématique ou d'un besoin.Les tuto sont bien faits et j'apprécie particulièrement les conseils avisés du support pour toujours mieux nous perfectionner.L'outil est puissant, et à la fois très accessible et intuitif dès la première utilisation.Enfin sur le terrain, nos techniciens utilisent l'application et plusieurs formulaires afin de réaliser des audits, des maintenances, c'est facile et facilement modifiable en cas de remontée terrain : les rapports émis sont automatiques et professionnels.
cons: Je n'ai pas remarqué particulièrement de points faibles, je voudrais juste informer les futurs utilisateurs que si vous vous lancez dans la dématérialisation de vos documents, il faut allouer du temps pour la création des formulaires, à minima 1 administrateur, qui sera en charge aussi d'apporter des améliorations sur les formulaires existants, et au mieux 1 administrateur par service fonction des besoins dans l'entreprise, car c'est comme tout, si personne ne s'en occupe alors le risque est grand d'être déçu.

review_title: Software para digitalizar tus procesos empresariales
description: Actualmente a la empresa que asesoro con sus procesos de digitalización le ha servido mucho en proyectos de mantenciones preventivas e inventarios de productos tecnológicos. El software le permite realizar formularios muy rápidamente y enviárselos a los técnicos en terreno que recolectan la información.
author: Gonzalo Alfonzo H.
pros: Herramienta fácil de usar, muy intuitiva a la hora de realizar los formularios y una app con buen funcionamiento y rápida.
cons: El proceso para configurar un reporte personalizado es un poco complicado si no tienes conocimientos de informática o programación básica. El no poder ver el progreso de la información que se esta llenando y el apartado de "gráficos" poco intuitivo de usar.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Appréciation d'un utilisateur régulier de Kizeo forms
description: Kizeo forme permet de digitaliser les processus métiers de l'entreprise . Les atouts : Gain de temps Tracabilité des données Meilleur service rendu aux clients (des rapports immédiats, numériques, incluant photos )
author: Bruno R.
pros: Les multiples fonctionnalités qui permettent de créer tous types de formulaires numériques pour remonter des données terrain. Fiabilité excellente Service technique très réactif L'application est très vite adoptée par tous les utilisateurs même ceux peu habiles avec l'informatique...
cons: La nouvelle fonctionnalité Planning est très intéressante mais mériterait d'évoluer encore pour être bien utile. Des fonctionnalités manquent au niveau de l'API (pouvoir mettre à jour de des fiches, transmettre des fichiers ou des photos...etc) Il serait utile de pouvoir programmer les envois d'email automatiques ( pas seulement à l'enregistrement mais suivant une date par exemple...) Les graphiques sont également un peu sommaires.

review_title: Fonctionnalité rapidité
description: Un gain de temps énorme (10 heures de moins au bureau) au bénéfice du terrain et des collaborateurs.
author: François H.
pros: La rapidité de diffusion des informations collectées, l étendue des collaborateurs informés, le gain de temps. Possibilité de recherche très détaillée et création de tableau avec photos collectées sue le chantier.
cons: Aucun. Prise en mains rapide, mise à jour régulière sans bug

review_title: Passez a la digitalisation grace a cette application !
author: Jerome L.
pros: Facile à utiliser, rapide, pas de beug, mise a jour instantanée lorsqu’on change les formulaires
cons: Peut etre offrir une session aux nouveaux abonnés d’1 heure a distance pour permettre d’etre émergé plus rapidement et le tutoriel par email et sur le site n’est malheureusement pas assez complet mais le SAV hotline est la pour aider, tres professionnel !
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reseña de Kizeo 10-08-2020
description: Muy buena, el servicio técnico que dan también es el mejor.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Muy adaptable a las necesidades del negocio, constante retroalimentación, excelente atención al cliente.
cons: Algunas funcionalidades que también las han pedido otros usuarios (poder hacer reportes de varios registros desde el históricos, etc).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fabulous product, very flexible, easy to use
description: Field flexibility, reduce filed costs. Timely issuance of filed reports.
author: barry F.
pros: Building blocks to build a form. Changes on the fly for field staff to have a form modified. Uploading and downloading of the completed forms. Great for repetitious work.
cons: Trying to understand what the icons are and how to use them., thus placing them in the wrong sequence and their function is not as intended, do you start over.

review_title: Digital forms in every department of your company
author: thayanne T.
pros: Receive data captured in the field instantly, send quick information to suppliers and customers, reports and inventories published automatically.
cons: Need to improve the ease of editing and deleting something faster.

review_title: Application works well, easy to program
author: Mathilde M.
pros: The application is easy to use. It is possible to chose which keyboard will be used by the user (numbers or letters first)
cons: Screen does not lock automatically. Programming online sometimes a bit complicated, with draging the elements. Does not work so well in tables.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simply Fantastic App
description: Nothing but fantastic from the app and the people I work with there, especially [sensitive content hidden] . If I have a question or need any help, the team gets right on it and will solve any problem I am having fast
author: Thomas V.
pros: The app is very easy to use for anyone, and the fact that the company was able to set it up for just the right purpose we had in mind
cons: I would like to see forms uploaded with a picture; other than that, nothing to complain about. The app was designed to do what we needed

review_title: Kizeo is Intuative, Reliable, and a pleasure to use
description: to perform our service works for our customers we cycle through arround 7 systems, Kizeo is by far my favourite and most reliable one to use. no crashing, buffering or not loading, reliable and issue free. it allows us to make our forms look the way we want and have our data manged in the way we require it to in order to provide fast and effective service to our customers.
author: Matt L.
pros: ease of use and reliability. Im not a massively techy person, yet i find it very intuative. and being able to upload multiple forms in one go saves me so much time. And the searching functionality is so useful.
cons: the only issue we have found is that if you revise a form and you want to search that form you have to look back on all of the revisions as they seem to exist in seperate places if that makes sense.

review_title: Excellent product
description: Overall, experience with Kizeo is very good and the App allows for use on site directly with possibility of adding pictures.
author: Quentin G.
pros: Easy to use, possibility to use various forms, search history database and modify previous entries to give update / close forms.
cons: Ergonomy could be improved on both phone and web browser. It is sometimes not obvious where to go next, questions can be missed out and the final save button should be more visible and renamed so it's more clear this will send and close/finish the form. Access to photo gallery could be made more user friendly with sorting pictures by months etc.

review_title: Great platform
description: Great! Loads of support from [sensitive content hidden] (he's very very patient!) Easy to set up your own forms and easy platform to navigate.
author: Christine G.
pros: Easy to create and use kizeo forms, and loads of support available. Easy to navigate the platform and the ability to create personalised forms that work for our needs.
cons: Being an oldie - getting used to using a new system and switching from paper forms. Not being able to understand how to use the planning calendar at first.
